description: Official MCP server: EU VAT validation via VIES, plus offline rates and format checks.
name: io.github.vatnode/vatnode-mcp

environmentVariables.description: vatnode API key (free tier available at https://vatnode.dev). Required only for the validate_vat_number tool — the four other tools (rates, format checks, country list) work offline without a key.
environmentVariables.name: VATNODE_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Override the vatnode API base URL (for self-hosting or staging environments). Defaults to https://api.vatnode.dev.
environmentVariables.name: VATNODE_API_URL
